data.title: Sunteck Realty Approves Convertible Warrants and New Director Appointment
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Sunteck Realty Limited ( (IN:SUNTECK) ) has shared an announcement.

Sunteck Realty Limited announced the approval of a preferential allotment of 1,17,64,705 warrants convertible into equity shares, valued at Rs. 499,99,99,625. This move involves both promoter and non-promoter groups and is subject to member and regulatory approvals. Additionally, the company appointed Mr. Ajeet Singh as an Additional and Whole-time Director, enhancing its leadership team. These strategic decisions are expected to strengthen Sunteck’s financial position and operational capabilities, potentially impacting its market standing positively.

More about Sunteck Realty Limited

Sunteck Realty Limited operates in the real estate industry, focusing on the development of residential and commercial properties. The company is known for its premium projects and has a significant market presence in Mumbai, India.

data.title: Elixxer Ltd. Proposes Debt Settlement via Share Issuance
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from Elixxer ( ($TSE:ELXR.H) ) is now available.

Elixxer Ltd. has announced a debt settlement plan involving the issuance of approximately 83.9 million common shares to settle over $6.9 million in debt. This move, which includes settlements with both arm’s length and non-arm’s length creditors, aims to improve the company’s financial position amid financial difficulties. The settlement requires shareholder approval for specific transactions and is subject to TSX Venture Exchange acceptance. The company is also addressing a legal claim and has announced the resignation of a director, Ferras Zalt, as part of its ongoing restructuring efforts.

More about Elixxer

Elixxer Ltd. operates within the financial and investment industry, focusing on managing debts and financial obligations through strategic settlements and advisory services. The company is engaged in issuing common shares to settle debts, indicating a focus on financial restructuring and improving its financial position.

data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Full Circle Lithium Corp ( (TSE:FCLI) ) has provided an announcement.

Full Circle Lithium Corp. has successfully closed a C$4.5 million private placement, which was upsized due to strong investor demand. The funds will enable the company to accelerate its growth strategy, including advancing product development, securing intellectual property rights, launching retail products, and developing a training center for fire response personnel. This financial boost positions Full Circle Lithium to enhance its market presence and scale its operations, reflecting investor confidence in its vision and technology.

More about Full Circle Lithium Corp

Full Circle Lithium Corp. is a U.S.-based manufacturer specializing in lithium products with a focus on sustainable solutions for the lithium and battery safety sector. Their flagship product, FCL-X™, is a non-hazardous, water-based fire-extinguishing agent designed to address the increasing threat of lithium-ion battery fires.

XTI Aerospace ( (XTIA) ) has provided an announcement.

XTI Aerospace, Inc. has appointed Michael A. Tapp as its Chief Operating Officer, effective September 1, 2025. Tapp, who has been with the company since September 2024 as chairman of the Corporate Advisory Board, brings extensive experience from his previous roles at Palingen Capital, HBC Investments, and Interstate Battery. His employment agreement includes a base salary of $600,000, performance bonuses, and stock options, with specific terms for termination and benefits. This strategic appointment is expected to enhance XTI Aerospace’s operational capabilities and strengthen its market position.

data.title: RF Capital Group Announces Acquisition by iA Financial Corporation
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

RF Capital Group ( (TSE:RCG) ) has shared an update.

RF Capital Group has announced the filing and mailing of its information circular related to its acquisition by iA Financial Corporation Inc. The board of directors recommends that shareholders vote in favor of the arrangement resolution at the upcoming special meeting. The acquisition will involve iA Financial acquiring all outstanding shares of RF Capital, with cash considerations provided for both common and Series B preferred shares. The arrangement requires approval from two-thirds of the common shareholders, and a significant portion of shares have already pledged support. This acquisition is expected to impact RF Capital’s market positioning by integrating with a larger financial entity, potentially benefiting stakeholders through enhanced resources and market reach.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:RCG) stock is a Buy with a C$21.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on RF Capital Group stock, see the TSE:RCG Stock Forecast page.

However, the stock is hindered by a poor valuation due to negative profitability metrics. Financial performance is improving but still faces challenges with profitability and operational efficiency.

data.title: Graphjet Technology Receives Nasdaq Non-Compliance Notice
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Graphjet Technology ( (GTI) ) has provided an announcement.

On September 2, 2025, Graphjet Technology received a notice from Nasdaq indicating non-compliance with the Nasdaq Listing Rule requiring a minimum market value of $50 million for 30 consecutive trading days. While this notice does not immediately affect the company’s listing, Graphjet is required to present its views to Nasdaq by September 9, 2025, and update on its fundraising plans by September 30, 2025, to address the deficiency.

More about Graphjet Technology

Graphjet Technology Sdn. Bhd., founded in 2019 in Malaysia, is an innovative producer of graphene and graphite. The company utilizes a patented technology to recycle palm kernel shells, a waste product from palm seed oil production, to create single layer graphene and artificial graphite, aiming to revolutionize the global supply chain for these materials.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.description:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

CFSB Bancorp, Inc ( (CFSB) ) has issued an announcement.

On May 20, 2025, CFSB Bancorp, Inc. entered into a merger agreement with Hometown Financial Group and its affiliates, which will result in a series of mergers culminating in the merger of Colonial Federal Savings Bank with North Shore Bank. Following the announcement, lawsuits were filed against CFSB Bancorp by purported stockholders alleging false and misleading proxy statements. The company denies these allegations but is making additional disclosures to avoid litigation delays and costs.
